evals.prompt: I have a DSPy RAG pipeline and I want to figure out whether my retriever or my generator is the weak link. How do I evaluate this?
evals.expected_output: Uses Ragas with decomposed metrics (Faithfulness, ContextPrecision, ContextRecall, ResponseRelevancy) imported from ragas.metrics.collections to diagnose retriever vs generator. Shows how to collect predictions, build an EvaluationDataset with SingleTurnSample, and interpret results.
assertions: Imports metrics from ragas.metrics.collections (not deprecated ragas.metrics)
Shows at least Faithfulness and one context metric
Explains which metrics evaluate the retriever vs the generator
Does not use deprecated LangchainLLMWrapper — uses llm_factory() if custom LLM needed
Mentions that ContextPrecision and ContextRecall require ground truth references

evals.prompt: Should I use Ragas or dspy.Evaluate to measure my RAG pipeline quality? What is the difference?
evals.expected_output: Explains that dspy.Evaluate is for overall accuracy and optimization objectives, while Ragas decomposes quality into retriever vs generator metrics. Recommends dspy.Evaluate for optimization and Ragas for post-optimization diagnosis.
assertions: Recommends dspy.Evaluate with SemanticF1 as the optimization objective
Recommends Ragas for post-optimization analysis to diagnose retriever vs generator
Warns that Ragas metrics are too slow for inner-loop optimization
Does not claim one tool replaces the other — they are complementary

evals.prompt: I want to evaluate my RAG pipeline with Ragas but I do not have ground truth answers. Which metrics can I still use?
evals.expected_output: Recommends Faithfulness and ResponseRelevancy as reference-free metrics. Explains that ContextPrecision, ContextRecall, and FactualCorrectness require ground truth.
assertions: Identifies Faithfulness and ResponseRelevancy (or AnswerRelevancy) as reference-free
States that ContextPrecision, ContextRecall, and FactualCorrectness need reference answers
Shows working code using SingleTurnSample without the reference field or with reference=None
Does not use deprecated Ragas APIs (Dataset, LangchainLLMWrapper, ground_truths)
